duas.title: Sha'aban - Daily Salawat
duas.description:
Recited daily at Noon time
The famous supplication of Salawat Sha’baniyyah is one of the most beautiful and valuable prayers which has been gifted to us by the mercy of the Almighty Allah (SWT) taught by Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him), in Authentic sources. He used to recite this Salawat every day in Sha`ban at the time sun passes the merdian (waqt-e-Zawal) and on the night of 15th Sha`ban. The main theme of this supplication revolves around the virtues of Ahlul Bayt (peace be upon them) as this is the month which Allah (SWT) dedicated to the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family).
duas.arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
شَجَرَةِ ٱلنُّبُوَّةِ
وَمَوضِعِ ٱلرِّسَالَةِ
وَمُخْتَلَفِ ٱلْمَلاَئِكَةِ
وَمَعْدِنِ ٱلْعِلْمِ
وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِ ٱلْوَحْيِ
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْجَارِيَةِ فِي ٱللُّجَجِ ٱلْغَامِرَةِ
يَأْمَنُ مَنْ رَكِبَهَا
وَيَغْرَقُ مَنْ تَرَكَهَا
ٱلْمُتَقَدِّمُ لَهُمْ مَارِقٌ
وَٱلْمُتَأَخِّرُ عَنْهُمْ زَاهِقٌ
وَٱللاَّزِمُ لَهُمْ لاَحِقٌ
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
ٱلْكَهْفِ ٱلْحَصِينِ
وَغِيَاثِ ٱلْمُضْطَرِّ ٱلْمُسْتَكِينِ
وَمَلْجَإِ ٱلْهَارِبِينَ
وَعِصْمَةِ ٱلْمُعْتَصِمِينَ
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
صَلاةً كَثِيرَةً تَكُونُ لَهُمْ رِضاً
وَلِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَدَاءً وَقَضَاءً
بِحَوْلٍ مِنْكَ وَقُوَّةٍ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ ٱلأَبْرَارِ ٱلأَخْيَارِ
ٱلَّذِينَ أَوْجَبْتَ حُقُوقَهُمْ
وَفَرَضْتَ طَاعَتَهُمْ وَوِلايَتَهُمْ
اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
وَٱعْمُرْ قَلْبِي بِطَاعَتِكَ
وَلاَ تُخْزِنِي بِمَعْصِيَتِكَ
وَٱرْزُقْنِي مُوَاسَاةَ مَنْ قَتَّرْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ
بِمَا وَسَّعْتَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
وَنَشَرْتَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ عَدْلِكَ
وَأَحْيَيْتَنِي تَحْتَ ظِلِّكَ
وَهٰذَا شَهْرُ نَبِيِّكَ سَيِّدِ رُسُلِكَ
شَعْبَانُ ٱلَّذِي حَفَفْتَهُ مِنْكَ بِٱلرَّحْمَةِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ
ٱلَّذِي كَانَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ
يَدْأَبُ فِي صِيَامِهِ وَقِيَامِهِ
فِي لَيَالِيهِ وَأَيَّامِهِ
بُخُوعاً لَكَ فِي إِكْرَامِهِ وَإِعْظَامِهِ
إِلَىٰ مَحَلِّ حِمَامِهِ
اَللَّهُمَّ فَأَعِنَّا عَلَىٰ ٱلإِسْتِنَانِ بِسُنَّتِهِ فِيهِ
وَنَيْلِ ٱلشَّفَاعَةِ لَدَيْهِ
اَللَّهُمَّ وَٱجْعَلْهُ لِي شَفِيعاً مُشَفَّعاً
وَطَرِيقاً إِلَيْكَ مَهْيَعاً
وَٱجْعَلْنِي لَهُ مُتَّبِعاً
حَتَّىٰ أَلْقَاكَ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَنِّي رَاضِياً
وَعَنْ ذُنُوبِي غَاضِياً
قَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ لِي مِنْكَ ٱلرَّحْمَةَ وَٱلرِّضْوَانَ
وَأَنْزَلْتَنِي دَارَ ٱلْقَرَارِ وَمَحَلِّ ٱلأَخْيَارِ
duas.transliteration:
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
shajarati alnnubuwwati
wa mawdi`i alrrisalati
wa mukhtalafi almala'ikati
wa ma`dini al`ilmi
wa ahli bayti alwahyi
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
alfulki aljariyati fi allujaji alghamirati
ya'manu man rakibaha
wa yaghraqu man tarakaha
almutaqaddimu lahum mariqun
walmuta'akhkhiru `anhum zahiqun
wallazimu lahum lahiqun
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
alkahfi alhasini
wa ghiyathi almudtarri almustakini
wa malja'i alharibina
wa `ismati almu`tasimina
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
salatan kathiratan takunu lahum ridan
wa lihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ada'an wa qada'an
bihawlin minka wa quwwatin ya rabba al`alamina
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
alttayyibina al-abrari al-akhyari
alladhina awjabta huquqahum
wa faradta ta`atahum wa wilayatahum
allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
wa`mur qalbi bita`atika
wa la tukhzini bima`siyatika
warzuqni muwasata man qattarta `alayhi min rizqika
bima wassa`ta `alayya min fadlika
wa nasharta `alayya min `adlika
wa ahyaytani tahta zillika
wa hadha shahru nabiyyika sayyidi rusulika
sha`banu alladhi hafaftahu minka bilrrahmati walrridwani
alladhi kana rasulu allahi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama
yad'abu fi siyamihi wa qiyamihi
fi layalihi wa ayyamihi
bukhu`an laka fi ikramihi wa i`zamihi
ila mahalli himamihi
allahumma fa-a`inna `ala alistinani bisunnatihi fihi
wa nayli alshshafa`ati ladayhi
allahumma waj`alhu li shafi`an mushaffa`an
wa tariqan ilayka mahya`an
waj`alni lahu muttabi`an
hatta alqaka yawma alqiyamati `anni radiyan
wa `an dhunubi ghadiyan
qad awjabta li minka alrrahmata walrridwana
wa anzaltani dara alqarari wa mahalla al-akhyari
duas.translation:
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
the tree of Prophethood,
the trustees of the (Divine) Mission,
the frequently visited by the angels,
the core of knowledge,
and the Household of the Divine Revelation.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the sailing ships through the abysmal waves.
He who embarks on will be saved
but he who abandons will be drowned.
He who precedes them will miss the Right Path
and he who misses them will lose,
but he who adheres to them will win.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the impregnable shelter,
the succorers of the helpless, distressed ones,
the haven of the fugitives,
and the asylum of those who seek refuge.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
so many blessings that please them
and settle all (our) duties towards Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
by Your might and power, O Lord of the worlds!
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the pure, pious, and righteous
whose rights have been made incumbent upon us by You
and the obedience to whom and whose (divinely ordained) leadership have been (also) deemed obligatory upon us by You.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
fill my heart with obedience to You,
do not disgrace me due to my acts of disobedience to You,
and grant me the feeling of sympathy towards those whom You have decided to straiten their sustenance
for You have blessed me with affluence in livelihood
since You have displayed Your justice on me
and bestowed life on me to live under Your shade.
This is the month of Your Prophet and the Master of Your Messengers.
It is Sha`ban, which You have encompassed with Your mercy and pleasure
and on which the Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings be upon him and his Household,
used to observe fasting painstakingly and used to spend it with acts of worship
on all of its days and nights
on account of Your honoring and dignifying this month,
up to his death.
O Allah, (please do) help us follow the example of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet as regards the honoring of this month)
and help us attain his intercession for us.
O Allah, (please do) decide him as my interceder (before You) whose intercession for me is acceptable
and as my clear path toward You,
and make me follow him
until I meet You on the Resurrection Day in such a state that You are pleased with me
having overlooked my sins
and confer upon me with Your mercy and good pleasure
settling me in the Eternal Abode and the Place of the Righteous.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
the tree of Prophethood,
the trustees of the (Divine) Mission,
the frequently visited by the angels,
the core of knowledge,
and the Household of the Divine Revelation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the sailing ships through the abysmal waves.
He who embarks on will be saved
but he who abandons will be drowned.
He who precedes them will miss the Right Path
and he who misses them will lose,
but he who adheres to them will win.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the impregnable shelter,
the succorers of the helpless, distressed ones,
the haven of the fugitives,
and the asylum of those who seek refuge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
so many blessings that please them

segments.arabic: وَلِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَدَاءً وَقَضَاءً
segments.transliteration: wa lihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ada'an wa qada'an
segments.translation: and settle all (our) duties towards Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: بِحَوْلٍ مِنْكَ وَقُوَّةٍ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: bihawlin minka wa quwwatin ya rabba al`alamina
segments.translation: by Your might and power, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the pure, pious, and righteous
whose rights have been made incumbent upon us by You
and the obedience to whom and whose (divinely ordained) leadership have been (also) deemed obligatory upon us by You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
fill my heart with obedience to You,
do not disgrace me due to my acts of disobedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مُوَاسَاةَ مَنْ قَتَّرْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni muwasata man qattarta `alayhi min rizqika
segments.translation: and grant me the feeling of sympathy towards those whom You have decided to straiten their sustenance
for You have blessed me with affluence in livelihood
since You have displayed Your justice on me
and bestowed life on me to live under Your shade.

segments.transliteration: wa hadha shahru nabiyyika sayyidi rusulika
segments.translation: This is the month of Your Prophet and the Master of Your Messengers.

segments.arabic: شَعْبَانُ ٱلَّذِي حَفَفْتَهُ مِنْكَ بِٱلرَّحْمَةِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ
segments.transliteration: sha`banu alladhi hafaftahu minka bilrrahmati walrridwani
segments.translation: It is Sha`ban, which You have encompassed with Your mercy and pleasure

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي كَانَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi kana rasulu allahi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama
segments.translation: and on which the Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings be upon him and his Household,
used to observe fasting painstakingly and used to spend it with acts of worship
on all of its days and nights

segments.transliteration: bukhu`an laka fi ikramihi wa i`zamihi
segments.translation: on account of Your honoring and dignifying this month,
up to his death.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَأَعِنَّا عَلَىٰ ٱلإِسْتِنَانِ بِسُنَّتِهِ فِيهِ
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) help us follow the example of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet as regards the honoring of this month)
and help us attain his intercession for us.
O Allah, (please do) decide him as my interceder (before You) whose intercession for me is acceptable
and as my clear path toward You,
and make me follow him

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ أَلْقَاكَ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَنِّي رَاضِياً
segments.translation: until I meet You on the Resurrection Day in such a state that You are pleased with me
having overlooked my sins

segments.arabic: قَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ لِي مِنْكَ ٱلرَّحْمَةَ وَٱلرِّضْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: qad awjabta li minka alrrahmata walrridwana
segments.translation: and confer upon me with Your mercy and good pleasure

segments.transliteration: wa anzaltani dara alqarari wa mahalla al-akhyari
segments.translation: settling me in the Eternal Abode and the Place of the Righteous.

duas.reference: Eqbal al amal by Seyed Ebn Tavoos 688
